ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO STAY
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED GRANTING MOTION TO STAY (TRANSACTION ID # 16244062) FILED BY DEFENDANT BRIGGS, JOHN FOODY, MICHAEL O'CONNOR, MARIANNE WARD, MARK

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS JOHN BRIGGS, MICHAEL FOODY, MARIANNE O'CONNOR AND MARK WARD'S MOTION TO STAY IS GRANTED. WHILE NOT A MODEL OF CLARITY (OR POETRY), THE BYLAWS AGREED TO BY THE PARTIES REQUIRE THAT THE PARTIES' DISPUTE BE RESOLVED AT THE LOCATION OF THE PROPERTY AT ISSUE, WHICH IS IN MEXICO. MOREOVER, THE PRINCIPLES OF FORUM NONCONVENIENS STRONGLY FAVOR RESOLUTION OF THIS CASE INVOLVING DISPUTES ABOUT THE USE OF MEXICAN PROPERTY IN MEXICO. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: LAURA MARTINEZ, CSR # 11332 =302/HK
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR OCT-18-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR STATUS OF STAY. THE OCT-18-2016 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 59994092)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-18-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-29-2017 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-28-2016 Continued To Oct-18-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay
Off Calendar Sep-01-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. PATRICIA BARLOW OF BARLOW LAW, TEL. NO. 1-415-977-1111 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. BRIAN T. HAFTER OF THE RIMON P.C., TEL. NO. 1-415-964-5207 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS JOHN BRIGGS, MICHAEL FOODY, MARIANNE O'CONNOR AND MARK WARD'S Motion To Stay is granted. While not a model of clarity (or poetry), the bylaws agreed to by the parties require that the parties' dispute be resolved at the location of the property at issue, which is in Mexico. Moreover, the principles of forum nonconveniens strongly favor resolution of this case involving disputes about the use of Mexican property in Mexico. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Laura Martinez, CSR # 11332 =302/hk

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2016 Continued To Oct-18-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-27-2016 Set For Order To Show Cause On Aug-23-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
